prompt: A creative 3D illusion artwork featuring a cute young girl emerging from a spiral notebook page resting on a wooden desk. The notebook shows lined paper with handwritten text at the top. The girl has a semi-realistic 3D cartoon look, soft wavy brown hair, natural makeup, and a sweet smile, dressed in a pastel crop top, high-waisted light grey jeans, and white sneakers. Her lower body appears as a pencil sketch on the notebook page while her upper body pops out realistically in three dimensions.
